mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lwh_ai_document WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM lwh_ai_document WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM lwh_ai_document WHERE status = 1 AND source_type IN ('CONTENT', 'FILE', 'MIXED')
AND category_id IN
#{categoryId}
AND 1 = 0
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND publish_status = #{publishStatus}
ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lwh_ai_document (category_id, title, file_name, file_type, file_size, storage_bucket, storage_path, parse_status, chunk_count, error_message, content_html, publish_status, source_type, status) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{title}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{storageBucket}, #{storagePath}, #{parseStatus}, #{chunkCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{contentHtml}, COALESCE(#{publishStatus}, 'DRAFT'), #{sourceType}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE lwh_ai_document SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, storage_bucket = #{storageBucket}, storage_path = #{storagePath}, parse_status = #{parseStatus}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, content_html = #{contentHtml}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, source_type = #{sourceType} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM lwh_ai_document WHERE status = 1 AND source_type IN ('CONTENT', 'FILE', 'MIXED')
AND category_id IN
#{categoryId}
AND 1 = 0
